- Current progress

 - Ziqi: Tribus returns good results on the stellar colon dataset,
 > but not stable. - why?

- How to organize the group meeting slide?

### Outline for group meeting \*30min

- Introduction for Tribus (how it works) - Teo

- What's new since the last group meeting - Teo

- Result - all of us

 - TMA and tCyCIF: new visualization function/features + Napari
 > (video)

 - Problems:

 - Marker quality evaluation
